query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ',', 1), ' - ', 1) as logradouro
FROM establishments 
WHERE address REGEXP BINARY '[A-Z][a-z]+io[^n]' 
AND address NOT REGEXP '[찼챕챠처첬창챗챤척청찾천챌횁횋횒횙횣횂횎횓횚횤횄횛횉]'
AND address NOT LIKE '%Pinheiros%'
AND address NOT LIKE '%Pedroso%'
AND address NOT LIKE '%Teodoro%'
AND address NOT LIKE '%Mario%'
LIMIT 10;
